name: The Main Character
effect: Reframe all surrounding activity as supporting context for this card's arc. This card is considered central.

clauses.name: NARRATIVE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If this card is present: All other cards are considered supporting characters.

clauses.name: CREDIT ABSORPTION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When a project succeeds: This card is retroactively declared its author.

clauses.name: VICTIMHOOD PROTECTION
clauses.rule: When this card is challenged: The challenge is reframed as a failure of vision by the challenger.

witness_quote: He just really drives the conversation.
